paper_title: Palynological Data Analysis in the Intra-Sudetic Basin

methods.description: This method describes the collection and processing of palynological samples from coal seams and associated carbonaceous mudstones in the Czech part of the Intra-Sudetic Basin. The samples were used to recover dispersed miospores and pollen for further analysis.

steps.description: Samples were macerated at Geoindustria Prague, an exploration company during the last few decades.
Dispersed miospores and pollen were recovered by dissolving rocks in nitric acid for 24-48 hours and KOH for 1-2 hours and washed by water several times.
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve rocks in nitric acid and KOH to recover miospores and pollen

steps.description: Miospores and pollen were classified according to the system of dispersed fossil spores suggested by Potonié & Kremp, Dettmann, and Smith & Butterworth.
steps.searchable_summary: classify miospores and pollen using established systems

methods.description: This method involves the analysis and visualization of palynological data to determine species richness and diversity patterns in the Intra-Sudetic Basin.

steps.description: Palynological data stored in the MafDat database have been exported to two Excel spreadsheets tables.
steps.searchable_summary: export palynological data to Excel spreadsheets

steps.description: In the first table, palynospecies are plotted against the stratigraphic column with resolution of individual fossiliferous horizons.
Construct diversity curves of palynological taxa by botanical groups as well as the curve of overall diversity of palynological taxa.
steps.searchable_summary: construct diversity curves for palynological taxa

steps.description: In the second table, percentage values of individual genera are plotted against the stratigraphic column.
steps.searchable_summary: plot percentage values of genera against stratigraphic column

steps.description: Construct graphs of percentage distribution of miospore and pollen genera throughout the studied stratigraphic interval.
steps.searchable_summary: construct graphs of percentage distribution for miospore and pollen genera
